name: OpenClaw OTel Plugin
description: Report OpenClaw AI agent execution traces to any OTLP-compatible backend via OpenTelemetry

headers.description: HTTP headers for authentication (e.g. API keys required by your OTLP backend)

batchSize.description: Number of spans to buffer before sending

flushIntervalMs.description: Maximum time (ms) to wait before sending buffered spans

enabledHooks.description: List of hooks to enable (if not set, all hooks are enabled)

enableTracePropagation.description: Enable W3C Trace Context propagation: inherit upstream traceparent and inject into outbound LLM calls

propagationTargetUrls.description: URL substrings for outbound traceparent injection (e.g. ["api.openai.com"]). Injects into all HTTPS calls except the OTLP endpoint if omitted.
